basic_details.job_title: KMRL Fleet Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Kochi Metro Rail (KMRL) has officially announced the Fleet Supervisor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 19 May 2026 at KMRL Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 56 to 62 years and hold qualification as Retired Sub Inspector/ Assistant Motor Vehicle Inspector from Police/ Motor Vehicles Department, Government of Kerala, with minimum 15 years of experience in Law Enforcement and Traffic Regulations can now submit their online applications from 19 May 2026 to 10 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 56 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age as on 01 May 2026

qualification.education_qualification: Retired not below rank of Sub Inspector/ Asst. Motor Vehicle Inspector from Police/ Motor Vehicles Department.
qualification.details: Candidates should be retired in a not below rank of Sub Inspector/ Asst. Motor Vehicle Inspector from Police/ Motor Vehicles Department, GoK. Minimum 15 Years of experience in Law Enforcement and Traffic Regulations. Preference will be given to candidates familiar with the traffic and transport eco-system in Kochi and having experience in dealing with Traffic Management.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KMRL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor position is 10 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Fleet Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired Sub Inspectors or Assistant Motor Vehicle Inspectors from the Police or Motor Vehicles Department of the Government of Kerala, with at least 15 years of experience in law enforcement and traffic regulations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Fleet Supervisor position is between 56 years (minimum) and 62 years (maximum) as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Fleet Supervisor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Fleet Supervisor post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 52,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Fleet Supervisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Fleet Supervisor post in Kochi Metro Rail (KMRL).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor recruitment is strictly online through the official KMRL website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the KMRL Fleet Supervisor recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Fleet Supervisor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Fleet Supervisor position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Does KMRL offer any age relaxation for retired personnel?
faq.answer: The age limit is specified as 56 to 62 years. Specific age relaxation details beyond this range are not explicitly mentioned in the provided summary, so refer to the official notification for further clarification.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates familiar with the traffic and transport ecosystem in Kochi and those with experience in traffic management.
